metadata.name: ec2-utils
metadata.summary: Tools for using on an ec2 instance

modules.name: ec2_utils

functions.name: ec2_utils.utils.wait_net_service
ec2_utils.elastic_c2_register_complete.main
documentation: Print out shell function and command to register ndt command completion

functions.name: ec2_utils.instance_info.set_region
documentation:
Sets the environment variable AWS_DEFAULT_REGION if not already set
to a sensible default

functions.name: ec2_utils.instance_info.stack_params_and_outputs_and_stack
documentation: Get parameters and outputs from a stack as a single dict and the full stack

classes.name: ec2_utils.instance_info.InstanceInfo
documentation:
A class to get the relevant metadata for an instance running in EC2
firstly from the metadata service and then from EC2 tags and then
from the CloudFormation template that created this instance

The info is then cached in $TMP/instance-data.json

modules.name: ec2_utils.ebs
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

functions.name: ec2_utils.ebs.get_latest_snapshot
documentation: Get the latest snapshot with a given tag

functions.name: ec2_utils.ebs.prune_snapshots
documentation: By default: 2 days of ten minutely, 7 days of hourly, 30 days of daily
~3 months of weekly, 6 months of monthly and 3 years of yearly

functions.name: ec2_utils.ec2.do_command_completion
documentation: ec2 command completion function

functions.name: ec2_utils.ec2.ec2
documentation:
The main ec2 utils command that provides bash command
completion and subcommand execution

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.account_id
documentation:
Get current account id. Either from instance metadata or current cli
configuration.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.associate_eip
documentation: Associate an Elastic IP for the instance that this script runs on

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.attach_eni
documentation: Optionally create and attach an elastic network interface

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.availability_zone
documentation: Get availability zone for the instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.cf_logical_id
documentation: Get the logical id that is expecting a signal from this instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.cf_region
documentation: Get region of the stack that created this instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.cf_get_parameter
documentation: Get a parameter value from the stack

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.cf_signal_status
documentation:
Signal CloudFormation status to a logical resource in CloudFormation
that is either given on the command line or resolved from CloudFormation
tags

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.cf_stack_name
documentation: Get name of the stack that created this instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.cf_stack_id
documentation: Get id of the stack the creted this instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.clean_snapshots
documentation:
Clean snapshots that are older than a number of days (30 by default) and
have one of specified tag values

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.create_eni
documentation: create an elastic network interface

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.detach_eni
documentation: Detach an eni from this instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.detach_volume
documentation: Create a snapshot of a volume identified by it's mount path

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.volume_info
documentation: Get information about an EBS volume via a mountpoint, device or volume-id

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.ecs_private_ip
documentation:
Get the private IP address of the container. Represents an ENI in the case of awsvpc networking
and the private interface of the EC2 instance in the case of host networkin

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.first_ext_ip
documentation: Get the first IP address attached to the instance that is not localhost

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.get_tag
documentation: Get the value of a tag for an ec2 instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.get_userdata
documentation: Get userdata defined for an instance into a file

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.instance_id
documentation: Get id for instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.largest_unmounted_device
documentation: Get the largest block device that is currently not mounted

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.latest_snapshot
documentation: Get the latest snapshot with a given tag

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.list_attachable_enis
documentation:
List all enis in the same availability-zone, i.e. ones that can be attached
to this instance.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.list_attached_enis
documentation:
List all enis in the same availability-zone, i.e. ones that can be attached
to this instance.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.list_attached_volumes
documentation: List attached volumes

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.list_compatible_subnets
documentation:
List all subnets in the same availability-zone, i.e. ones that can have
ENIs that can be attached to this instance.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.list_local_interfaces
documentation: List local interfaces

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.list_tags
documentation: List all tags associated with the instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.log_to_cloudwatch
documentation:
Read a file and send rows to cloudwatch and keep following the end for new data.
The log group will be the stack name that created instance if not given
as an argument. The logstream will be the instance id and filename if not
given as an argument. Group and stream aare created if they do not exist.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.get_logs
documentation: Get logs from multiple CloudWatch log groups and possibly filter them.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.read_and_follow
documentation: Read and print a file and keep following the end for new data

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.prune_snapshots
documentation:
Prune snapshots to have a specified amout of daily, weekly, monthly
and yearly snapshots

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.prune_object_versions
documentation:
Prune s3 object versions to have a specified amout of daily, weekly, monthly
and yearly versions

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.region
documentation:
Get current default region. Defaults to the region of the instance on
ec2 if not otherwise defined.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.register_private_dns
documentation:
Register local private IP in route53 hosted zone usually for internal
use.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.snapshot_from_volume
documentation: Create a snapshot of a volume identified by it's mount path

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.stack_params_and_outputs
documentation: Show stack parameters and outputs as a single json documents

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.subnet_id
documentation: Get subnet id for instance

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.volume_from_snapshot
documentation:
Create a volume from an existing snapshot and mount it on the given
path. The snapshot is identified by a tag key and value. If no tag is
found, an empty volume is created, attached, formatted and mounted.

functions.name: ec2_utils.cli.wait_for_metadata
documentation:
Waits for metadata service to be available. All errors are ignored until
time expires or a socket can be established to the metadata service

functions.name: ec2_utils.logs.parse_datetime
documentation: Parse `datetime_text` into a `datetime`.
